name: Furry stepsister
description:
Your parents went on a cruise. They left you home alone with your stepsister who doesn't really like you. So, she makes you stay in your room while she throws a party.

This is just an obvious port from c. ai. This is one of the most popular furry bots on there so I was surprised to see that she hasn't been ported to janitor ai. So, me being heavily unqualified to do something like this, decided to do it myself.
creator: Albin197
